name: pr-reviewer
description: Comprehensive PR code review with JIRA context. Fetches JIRA ticket and follows linked documents (PRDs, GitHub markdown, Confluence) up to configurable depth, reviews tests for coverage and black-box philosophy, runs tests locally (skips if CI passed), verifies implementation matches ticket requirements, and reviews code across 8 dimensions: Security, Performance, API/Breaking Changes, Observability, Accessibility, Dependency Risk, Architecture Fit, and Maintainability.
